reviews.text: I had no idea what to do when I first opened the app. There is no tutorial and the onboarding just dumps you on a blank screen. Spent 20 minutes confused before giving up.
The setup process is really unclear. I could not figure out how to connect my first data source. Needs a proper walkthrough.
Getting started is a nightmare. The onboarding flow skips over basic steps and assumes you already know how everything works.
No onboarding guide at all. First time users are left completely in the dark. Please add a walkthrough or at least a tooltip tour.
App is powerful but the initial setup is confusing. Took me three tries to get my workspace configured correctly.
Why is there no onboarding checklist? Every other SaaS tool I use has one. Starting from scratch with zero guidance is frustrating.
App crashes every time I try to load a report with more than 500 rows. This has been happening for weeks and there is no fix.
Constant crashes on iOS 17. Opens fine but crashes after about 2 minutes of use. Unusable right now.
Performance is terrible. Loading the dashboard takes 15 seconds every time. The app needs serious optimization.
Crashes on startup since the last update. iPhone 14 Pro, iOS 17.2. Please fix this urgently.
The app is slow. Every action has a noticeable delay. Comparing this to competitors it feels years behind on performance.
I cannot use this app at all. It freezes on the data view screen. Have reinstalled three times. Same result.
Desperately need a bulk export feature. Right now I have to download reports one by one which takes forever for large datasets.
Good tool but missing bulk export. I manage 50 clients and downloading individual reports is not scalable.
Please add CSV export for all data at once. The current export only does single items and it is a huge time sink.
The navigation is confusing. I can never find the settings I am looking for. The menu structure does not match how I think about the product.
Hard to find anything in the sidebar. The information architecture needs a rethink. Important features are buried three levels deep.
Navigation is not intuitive at all. Took me 10 minutes to find where to manage integrations. Should be in the main menu.
Best analytics tool I have used. Clean interface, fast, and the insights are genuinely useful. Highly recommend.
Game changer for our product team. The way it surfaces patterns from our feedback is exactly what we needed.
Onboarding is completely broken. The welcome email link takes you to a 404 page. First impression ruined.
The app crashes whenever I switch between projects. Very reproducible. Happens every single time.
Decent app but needs bulk operations badly. Bulk archive, bulk export, bulk tag. Power users need these.
Setup took me a full day because there were no instructions. A simple getting started guide would save everyone so much time.
Memory leak on Android. The app gets progressively slower until the phone needs a restart. Known issue apparently.
Mostly great. The only thing I wish for is bulk export. Would make my weekly reporting workflow so much faster.
Cannot figure out the navigation. Where is the user management section? I have looked everywhere.
App is broken after the latest update. Black screen on launch. Please roll back or push a fix.
Useful product but the first-time experience is rough. I almost churned in the first week because I could not get started.
Excellent product. The team clearly listens to feedback. Keep up the great work.
